odyssey_portal.name: Bell County Odyssey Portal

online_payments.name: Bell County Online Payments
online_payments.description: Pay citations and court fines online

crime_victim_assistance.name: Bell County Crime Victim Assistance
crime_victim_assistance.description: Support services for crime victims in Bell County

service_areas.name: Belton
service_areas.description: County seat of Bell County. Home to the Bell County Justice Center and all District Courts, County Courts at Law, and county administrative offices.

service_areas.name: Killeen
service_areas.description: Largest city in Bell County and home to Fort Cavazos (formerly Fort Hood). Killeen Municipal Court handles city ordinance violations and Class C misdemeanors.

service_areas.name: Temple
service_areas.description: Second-largest city in Bell County. Major medical and economic hub with its own municipal court system.

service_areas.name: Fort Cavazos (Fort Hood)
service_areas.description: One of the largest military installations in the world. Military personnel and their families in the surrounding area may face legal matters in Bell County courts. Civilian offenses off-post are handled by Bell County or municipal courts.

service_areas.name: Waco
service_areas.description: Located in neighboring McLennan County, approximately 45 minutes south of Belton. Some Central Texas legal matters may involve courts in both Bell and McLennan counties.

service_areas.name: Harker Heights
service_areas.description: Adjacent to Killeen, with its own municipal court handling city-level cases.

service_areas.name: Copperas Cove
service_areas.description: Located in western Bell County near Fort Cavazos with its own municipal court.
